name: mindease-root
description: MindEase: GenAI Mental Wellness Companion for High-Stakes Exams

scripts.postinstall: npm run install-client && npm run install-server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix server && npm run test --prefix client
scripts.lint: npm run format:check && npm run lint --prefix server && npm run lint --prefix client
scripts.lint:fix: npm run format && npm run lint:fix --prefix server && npm run lint:fix --prefix client
